claim.summary: Lane 2 audited the current canonical Main Flow spatial asset references and found four missing per-hand mask files at nodes 1051-1054 plus the already-known zero-valued character_b_body_mask.png at node 1009.

runtime.lane2_runtime_action: EC2 was not started or stopped; no endpoint was called.

artifacts.description: Current-workflow audit covering LoadImage/LoadImageMask spatial assets, mask occupancy, per-hand masks, depth/normal/occlusion assets, ControlNet requirements, composites, and previews.
Read-only reusable audit script for Main Flow spatial asset references.
Lane 1 request for nodes 1009 and 1051-1054 semantics and per-hand source mapping.
Blocker record for missing per-hand masks and scene-hash mismatch with candidate strict side-push masks.
Strict hand/contact review record for the current spatial asset audit.
Lane 2 status report for the current Main Flow spatial asset audit slice.

checks.name: audit_tool_execution
checks.notes: Lane 2 audit tool ran successfully against the current canonical Main Flow and input-reference root.

checks.name: workflow_hash_current
checks.notes: Audit artifact workflow hash matches current WAVE42_MAIN_FLOW_20260702.json hash 273158B6B84CEFC67A706AC1C4656D90CFBEBF04F0890A9230DD526475D5B96D.

checks.name: per_hand_mask_files
checks.notes: Nodes 1051-1054 reference four per-hand masks that do not exist in active body_contact_slots.

checks.name: same_scene_source_consistency
checks.notes: Available strict side-push left/right masks belong to a different base image hash than the active body_contact_slots base, so Lane 2 did not copy them.

checks.name: character_b_body_mask
checks.notes: Node 1009 character_b_body_mask.png remains present but zero-valued.

checks.name: depth_normal_occlusion_assets
checks.notes: Soft body depth, normal, pressure, indentation, contact shadow, and occlusion assets exist and are nonzero in the current audit.

checks.name: runtime_validation
checks.notes: This is a local asset/reference audit only; live runtime validation remains a Lane 4 task after Lane 1 resolves graph semantics.

failure_reasons: Nodes 1051-1054 reference missing per-hand mask files.
Node 1009 remains a zero-valued actor body mask.
Final generated hand/contact/collision/deformation quality was not visually reviewed.

blockers.description: Current Main Flow nodes 1051-1054 reference per-hand mask files that do not exist in active body_contact_slots, and available strict side-push masks do not match the active base image hash.
blockers.next_action: Lane 1 should choose active preset semantics and provide an exact same-scene source/mapping, or permit explicit zero/off masks for disabled per-hand controls.
Lane 1 should choose actor-hand-only graph semantics or request/provide a trustworthy actor body segmentation source for Lane 2.

blockers.description: The current Main Flow spatial controls have not been run through live ComfyUI after Lane 1's latest node additions.
blockers.next_action: After Lane 1 resolves nodes 1009 and 1051-1054 semantics, Lane 4 can validate runtime behavior in a justified live window.
